titleStmt.title: SII 26.557: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 557. (A.R. No. 527 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the verandah round the same shrine.

p.hi: Perumāḷ Tirunelvēlipperumāḷ Dharma-perumāḷ Kulaśēkharadēva, son of Jaṭilavarman
Tribhº Kōṉērimaikoṇḍāṉ Abhirāma Parākramapāṇḍyadēva: Ś. 1485 and year 13, Rudhirōdgārin, Uttarāyaṇa, Varshā-ṛitu, Kumbha (Māśi) 10 (?) su. 3, Monday, Uttiram = 1563 A.D., Irregular.

summary.p: This inscription is also in Tamil and Grantha characters. It refers to the king as Vīraveṇbāmālaiyāṉ.

It states that in former days a certain Śaṅkaraṉ, the brother of (Nāguṭṭi Kōḻaṅgidēvaṉ) of Nāgapāśattūr was granted land as bērigai-kāṇi and that it was resumed by the king, and that on request from Aḻagaṉ-Perumāḷ Ativīrarāmaṇ, the land in Kīḻapparākkiṟamanallūr in Teṉkāśi in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu, which was previously held by him, was re-granted to him. It is stated that the servant would get also a house-site in the same place and also a share in the temple offerings, as well as other attendant gifts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍārya metat sattam samasta suramaulibhiḥ śāsanam viśvanādhasya śambhorjayati śā
śvanam Ādi caṇḍaśvarājñeyam śamakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 5l mel cellāniṉṟa svastiśrī koja
ṭilavarmmarāna tribhuvanaścakravatti konermaikoṇḍān Abhirāma parākrama pāṇḍiya de
var nandanarānaWritten below. śrī perumāḷ tirunelvelip perumāḷ viraveṇpāmālaiyāṉ dharmmapperumāḷ
kulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatu rudhirotkāri samvatsarattu Utta- rāyaṉattu varuṣaṛtuvila
kumpa raviniyum pūrvvapakṣattu tiṟitikaiyum somavāramum kirutiyogamum ṛṣabhakaraṇamum peṟṟa U
ttirattu nāḷ nākapācattūril nākuṭṭi koḻaṅki tevaṉ tampi caṅkaraṉukku muṉṉāḷ perikaik
kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka Iṟaipuravi Uḷḷiṭṭār kāṟṟāṉ kāṉiyāṭcaiyāka nām kaiyyāṇṭu kiṭanta peri
kaik kāṇiyāṭcai kuṭukkak kaṟpittu nam kumāraṉ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉ Olai namvācal turakkāṟku
varukaiyil nam vācal kāriyam Āṭiyaṉāpaṭṭaṉum kāriyak kaṇakkuk kotaṇṭa rāmaṉum kaṇkāṇikka
ṇakkukkum nilam Ativirarāma mutaliyum kaṟmiyuḷil kumāraśvāmibhaṭṭaṉum Ālaiyakkaṇakku Arikeśvara
tevaṉum kaṟmikaḷ kaṇakku comaṉātevaṉum toṇṭarkaḷ kaṇakku viśva- nātaṉum ceṉaikkaṇa
kku Appaṉ paṭṭaṉum kaṇakkaṉ paṭiyuṇṭu Uṭaiyāṉaiyum paḻamperaiyuttavi
ttu viṭṭa Avaṉ kaiyyāṇṭu pontapaṭiye teṉṉāri nāṭṭut teṉkāci kiḻaipparākkiṟama pāṇṭiya na
llūril nilamWritten below.kāṇiyum meṟpaṭiyūril Avaṉ Irunta kāṇiyāṭcai maṉai Oṉṟum nāḷ Oṉṟukku picāta mu
m Uṭamaiyum Acal perikaik kāṟṟukuṭutta cuvantiraṅkaḷum paṟṟikkoṇṭu piṉmuṟaiWritten below.Eḻarai nā
muñceytu potumpaṭi Ācantiratāravaṟ cantatippiṟavecame cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭi kaiyyāṇṭu
koḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai koṭumaḷūr UṭaiyāṉWritten below.Eḻuttu Ādicaṇḍiśvaran Eḻuttu § velumayilum §
Digital edition of SII 26.557 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
